name: thomas-modules
description: Reusable feature modules for Next.js projects — extracted from elite, elitemess, elitestore, dashboard and tidsrapport

modules.name: authentication
modules.description: JWT-based login/register with invite codes, admin accounts, session tracking, DB-backed brute-force lockout, and short-lived media-scoped capability tokens for ?t= query auth on asset routes

modules.name: user-profiles
modules.description: Bio, displayName, avatar upload, password change, session management (remote logout)

modules.name: admin-panel
modules.description: Generate and manage invite codes

modules.name: presence-system
modules.description: Online/offline status, last_seen, and custom statuses (online/away/dnd) via Socket.IO

modules.name: channel-management
modules.description: CRUD for channels, categories, memberships. Banner/icon images. Supports public channels and DMs.

modules.name: live-chat
modules.description: Realtime chat — messages, typing, reactions, edit/delete, reply-to, expiring messages, @mentions

modules.name: direct-messaging
modules.description: DMs between two users with read receipts and unread counter per channel

modules.name: bookmarks
modules.description: Save messages for later. Personal bookmarks per user.

modules.name: message-pinning
modules.description: Pin important messages in channels (admin-only)

modules.name: message-search
modules.description: Full-text search over messages and filenames (LIKE-based, FTS5-ready)

modules.name: mention-autocomplete
modules.description: @-autocomplete for users and #-channels

modules.name: link-preview
modules.description: Stateless URL preview (Open Graph + title tag)

modules.name: social-feed
modules.description: Posts, likes, comments. Supports media uploads and sharing chat messages to the feed.

modules.name: file-upload-storage
modules.description: Generic file upload and serving with HTTP Range, HEIC→JPEG conversion, custom folders, and thumbnails

modules.name: auto-share-folder-watcher
modules.description: Watches folders and auto-shares new files to a chat channel as messages

modules.name: apk-management
modules.description: APK versioning, auto-update for Capacitor clients, and smart icon extraction from APK files

modules.name: auth-nextauth
modules.description: NextAuth credentials provider with role-based access (user/admin) — alternative to the JWT-based authentication module

modules.name: app-catalog-core
modules.description: Filesystem-based catalog for versioned apps/games. Auto-discovers entries from STORE_ROOT/{type}/{slug}/. No DB needed.

modules.name: asset-serving-with-auth
modules.description: Auth-gated endpoint serving logo/banner/screenshots/markdown from the catalog with path-traversal protection

modules.name: version-management
modules.description: VersionList component showing multi-version, multi-architecture file listings with download links

modules.name: admin-metadata-crud
modules.description: Admin editor + API for catalog item metadata (info.md frontmatter) and asset uploads (logo/banner/screenshots)

modules.name: markdown-content-renderer
modules.description: Stateless React Markdown renderer with GitHub-Flavored Markdown

modules.name: app-card-components
modules.description: Card layouts for catalog browsing: grid (AppCard), row (AppRowCard), landscape (AppLandscapeCard), hero (HeroCard), Install button

modules.name: category-filter
modules.description: Stateless filter pills with horizontal scroll

modules.name: file-download-with-logging
modules.description: Authenticated download endpoint that streams catalog files and logs each download in the DB

modules.name: catalog-browser-pages
modules.description: Reference pages: home (hero + sections), type listing with filter, search. Plus Header/Section/EmptyState/CatalogGrid components.

modules.name: app-detail-page
modules.description: Detail page template with multi-arch install buttons, screenshot lightbox, markdown body, tags, and version list

modules.name: customer-register
modules.description: CRUD for customers + flexible lookup (number/phone/SSN with format normalisation) + optional cross-table transaction history aggregator

modules.name: article-catalog-with-pricing
modules.description: Article (product) CRUD with bundle pricing (X-for-Y) and an effective-price calculator

modules.name: repair-receipt-workflow
modules.description: Service/repair receipts with warranty, fault description, technician, and a 4-step status workflow (intake → in_progress → ready → picked_up)

modules.name: company-register-with-vat-lookup
modules.description: B2B company CRUD with internal search and an EU VIES VAT-number lookup (Sweden-specific helpers)

modules.name: biltema-product-lookup
modules.description: Adapter for Biltema's public typeahead API: lookup, search, random sampling. Useful for retail/inventory apps that resell or reference Biltema items.

modules.name: ytdlp-wrapper
modules.description: Server-side yt-dlp wrapper: metadata fetch, YouTube search, URL resolve, flat-playlist dump, helpers for spawning yt-dlp directly. Cookie-aware with structured errors.

modules.name: media-utils
modules.description: Pure utility functions: YouTube URL detection / ID extraction, thumbnail building, duration / view-count formatting, URL classification. Zero dependencies.

modules.name: video-player-toolkit
modules.description: YouTube-style HTML5 player toolkit: usePlayerKeyboard hook (space/k/j/l/0-9/F/M/arrows), useVideoResume hook (localStorage position), PlayerOsd overlay, SpeedSelector, ContinueWatching carousel.

modules.name: pin-content-gate
modules.description: Bcrypt PIN gate with session cookie. Restrict access to a section of an app on top of normal auth (age gate, paid tier, dev-only routes). Numeric keypad component, admin set-PIN endpoint, verify endpoint.

modules.name: playlist-import-job
modules.description: Bulk-import every entry of a yt-dlp-supported playlist URL (YouTube, Vimeo) into a local media table. Single transaction, returns per-item counts and errors.

modules.name: swedish-tax-holidays
modules.description: Swedish-locale helpers: Skatteverket monthly tax-table lookup (2025/2026, columns 29-42), municipality list, public holidays via Computus + Midsummer + All Saints + half-days.

modules.name: time-entry-crud
modules.description: Generic time-entry table + CRUD route + week/month calendar views with red-day highlighting + Material-style date and 24h clock pickers + multi-break and task-segment editors. Drizzle.

modules.name: tabular-pdf-generator
modules.description: jsPDF helper for tabular documents (payslip, invoice, manifest, expense report): header rows + column-based body table + summary box + footer disclaimer. Includes a Swedish payslip example.

modules.name: claude-vision-image-parser
modules.description: Generic Claude Vision wrapper: image + prompt → parsed JSON. Includes a schedule-from-image reference; bring your own prompt for invoices, receipts, timesheets, forms.

modules.name: photo-gallery
modules.description: Google-Photos-style library: timeline, albums, smart albums, map view, auto-trip detection, year-in-review, tag browser, share links, EXIF + geotag, content-hash dedup

modules.name: dashboard-widgets
modules.description: Free-form per-user dashboard: drag, resize from 8 directions, vertical compaction, three breakpoints. Storage + API + DashboardGrid wrapper around react-grid-layout. Does not include integration widgets.

modules.name: video-share
modules.description: Drop-in 'share to feed / story / DM' modal. One UI over social-feed + stories-with-ttl + direct-messaging.

modules.name: bookshelf
modules.description: Shared bookshelf with EPUB / PDF / CBZ reader, per-user reading-position sync, and FS-driven catalogue scan. Uses poppler-utils for PDF covers and media-scoped ?t= tokens for asset auth.

modules.name: clips-library
modules.description: Per-profile short-video library with posters, comments, view/like counters, transcode-status tracking, and unified clip_profiles model with yt-dlp auto-poll, videos_limit and sticky skip-list (supersedes tiktok-mirror)

modules.name: tiktok-mirror
modules.description: [DEPRECATED — use clips-library] Self-hosted TikTok mirror with daily metadata polling and lazy video download via yt-dlp

modules.name: web-push-vapid
modules.description: VAPID-based Web Push notifications with subscription management and server-side send helper

modules.name: stories-with-ttl
modules.description: Instagram/Snapchat-style ephemeral stories with configurable TTL and on-disk archival when expired

modules.name: instagram-mirror
modules.description: Self-hosted Instagram mirror. yt-dlp first, gallery-dl fallback, daily auto-poll

modules.name: transcoder-pipeline
modules.description: Host-side automation: ffmpeg+VLC transcoding to .web.mp4, organize-flat-files-into-profiles scripts, expired-story archival, systemd timer + path triggers

modules.name: notification-bell
modules.description: In-app notification center with bell icon, unread badge, live updates via Socket.IO

modules.name: follows-system
modules.description: User→user follows plus a generic table for following non-user profiles (TikTok handles, photo collections)

modules.name: dashboard-shell
modules.description: Collapsible sidebar + sticky top bar app-shell layout pattern with feature-gated nav items

modules.name: pwa-service-worker
modules.description: Minimal PWA package: service worker for push + notificationclick, manifest scaffolding, Web Share Target receiver

modules.name: adults-pin-gate
modules.description: Per-user 4-digit PIN that gates 18+ areas. Different from pin-content-gate (shared PIN) — this one is per-user, set on first use

modules.name: activity-badges
modules.description: Activity counters per user plus a rule-driven badge engine that grants achievements when thresholds are crossed

modules.name: avatar-banner-upload
modules.description: Avatar and banner upload with in-browser cropping, content-hash filenames, deterministic gradient fallback

modules.name: section-tabs
modules.description: Pill-style sub-navigation tabs for grouped pages. Auto-active detection from usePathname()

modules.name: privacy-screenshot
modules.description: Floating privacy widget: CSS-blur images/videos/PII + tap-to-blur custom elements, then one-click PNG screenshot via html-to-image with full-page mode and MSE-video/broken-image fallbacks
